MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

After hearing, the court vacates its order dismissing the case without prejudice and orders the OSC off calendar. Dismissal filed. (610)
